scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,storefront,admin -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w storefront" "npm run dev -w admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w storefront && npm run build -w admin
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,storefront,admin -c blue,magenta,green "npm run start -w backend" "npm run start -w storefront" "npm run start -w admin"
